description_long: This is a vintage-style, freestanding oven and stove unit with a muted green enamel finish and black accents. The front features four large drawers or compartments, a small oven window, and six round control knobs arranged in a row above the compartments. The cooktop has four gas burners, symmetrically placed, and a central metallic sink or workspace. The back panel rises above the cooktop and includes a metallic accent and a small circular feature, possibly a clock or timer. The sides and back are plain, with the same green finish, and the overall design is boxy and robust, typical of mid-20th-century kitchen appliances.
description: A vintage green oven and stove unit with four burners, six control knobs, and multiple compartments, featuring a small oven window and a raised back panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing four burners, six control knobs, four compartments, a small oven window, and a raised back panel with a metallic accent.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain green side panel and the depth of the cooktop and back panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, featureless green back panel with a small raised section at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain green side and the profile of the cooktop and back panel.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is a horizontal strip above the oven compartments, featuring six evenly spaced round knobs with beige faces and metallic rims. There are no visible digital displays or touchscreens. The panel is simple, with a metallic accent in the center and a small circular feature above, possibly a clock or timer.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is a horizontal, protruding bar with a metallic appearance, mounted across the width of the oven door. It is rounded for ergonomic grip and visually matches the vintage style of the appliance.
attribute_window_presence: present, a small rectangular window is located on the right oven door, allowing a view into the oven compartment.
